title: Ribbe Delight
description: All this adds a norwegian ribbe
body:
This lighweight mod adds the most famous norwegian christmas dish of all time to the game: Ribbe! Just kill a few pigs and collect a few bones, and you too can transform your minecraft world into the Nordic wonderland of your dreams!
You need Farmers Delight
CurseForge Link
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ribbe-delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ribbe-delight)
